description_long: This is a small, simple cabin with a green rectangular structure set atop a wide, brown wooden platform. The cabin features a steep gable roof in brown, extending over the front and sides, with a slight overhang on the left side. The front facade has a centered door and a small rectangular window above it, both outlined in beige. A short set of stairs leads up to the platform, providing access to the entrance. The left side of the cabin has a single square window, while the right side and rear are windowless and unadorned. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a utilitarian appearance, suitable for parks or urban green spaces.
description: A small green cabin with a brown gable roof, set on a wide wooden platform with stairs and minimal windows. The design is simple and functional, with a front door and a single side window.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green wall with a single square window and the brown platform extending outward, including a visible overhang on the left.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the centered door, a small rectangular window above it, and stairs leading up to the platform.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a plain green wall and no windows or doors, and the platform's overhang visible on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid green wall with no openings or architectural features.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and slight overhang on the left side, constructed from wood or similar material
attribute_window_arrangement: one small square window on the left side and one small rectangular window above the front door, asymmetrically distributed
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed by stairs
